## Description

Provide a short summary of the change and relevant context (UI / UX / business logic).

---

## Type of change

Please select the appropriate option:

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] UI / UX update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Other (please describe)

---

## What was changed?

- ...

---

## Screenshots / Video

> Required if there are UI changes

---

## How Has This Been Tested? (Manual)

1. Run FE Web locally
2. Login with the appropriate role
3. Verify:
   - [ ] Case 1
   - [ ] Case 2

---

## Risk Level

- [ ] Low – UI-only or safe change
- [ ] Medium – affects logic or state
- [ ] High – affects authentication or data flow

---

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title contains `[BH-KEY]`
- [ ] Commit messages follow the convention
- [ ] Jira ticket is linked
- [ ] UI layout is not broken
- [ ] Responsive behavior works correctly
- [ ] Manual testing completed
